workLog.task: Triage 24+ open issues; fix 11 across PRs #2683/#2685; close 11 with justification; file 4 new issues.
Accept ADR-073 (owner-authorized) and ship #2583 lifecycle-frontmatter tooling.

uv run pytest on portability/lease/catalog suites

Lease timestamp fixtures now use valid RFC3339 datetime arithmetic; adr-review checklist no longer suggests invalid needs-revision frontmatter.
